commit.message: Support prebuilt binaries for MacOS on arm64
Add error message when failing to copy Bazel output

Drop -march=native for macos

It's unclear, but this could be related to the error:

  external/boringssl/src/crypto/cpu_aarch64_apple.c:56:2: error: "NEON and crypto extensions should be statically available."
Debug GitHub low disk space error
Bump required Python version and add tf_keras requirement
Update protos and ops for TensorFlow 2.17.0

commit.message:
Adding requested changes

- RELEASING.md now has info about the new tensorflow-sys-runtime crate.
- Additional info in the tensorflow-sys-runtime README.md showing how to use it.
- Adding the version to tensorflow-sys-runtime in the main Cargo.toml
- Removing runtime linking bindgen calls from tensorflow-sys/generate_bindgen_rs.sh

Moving runtime bindings into their own crate

Currently the runtime bindings live inside of
tensorflow-sys, which includes several packages for
building tensorflow. These packages aren't needed
for the runtime bindings at all, and this seems like
the logical way to separate the two.

commit.message: Swapping unwrap with ? to catch possible error.

Undoing previous and adding the actual fix

Unwrap now only occurs once we have checked the
result isn't an error. Errors will now be returned
in the function's result.
Now returns the Err from SharedLibrary::load

commit.message:
Simpify the Shape
construction from vec

Introduce ReadonlyTensor for the eager mode.

This Tensor may be required to avoid Rust's UB.

add the Rust's memory design unittest.

Currently, this unittest may fail.
add Op's ut for generic sized array.
implement trait for generic sized array
add trait implementation for other types
update raw_ops ut that takes combination inputs.

update raw_ops test ut to use ToTensorHandle trait

Now it accepts both tensor and handle.

add ToTensorHandle helper trait

This trait is to unify the Tensor and the TensorHandle for the eager
execution API

commit.message:
private-docs-rs feature should be propagated to tensorflow-sys.

The private-docs-rs feature was introduced to avoid large file
downloading when building docs in docs.rs.
delete handles when `execute` exit with error.
add some wrappers. but not implemented yet.
add Op's lifetime bounds to ctx
add unittest for Op executed on GPU
